name: openedge-db-schema
description: View and explore OpenEdge database schema

openedge-db-schema.records.converterProc.description: Optional path to an ABL procedure used to convert column values when fetching records. The procedure must have the signature: INPUT p_table AS CHARACTER, INPUT p_column AS CHARACTER, INPUT p_datatype AS CHARACTER, INPUT p_value AS CHARACTER, OUTPUT p_result AS CHARACTER.

openedge-db-schema.records.dbConnectionO.description: Per-database connection overrides used when running fetch_table_records.p. Each entry must specify 'database' (matching the name in openedge-project.json) and either 'pf' (path to a .pf parameter file, passed as -pf) or 'connectString' (raw connect flags, e.g. -db mydb -H localhost -S 3000). When both are provided, 'pf' takes precedence. A matched entry replaces the connection derived from openedge-project.json.

database.description: Database name as declared in openedge-project.json dbConnections.

pf.description: Absolute path to a .pf parameter file. Passed to _progres as -pf <path>.

connectString.description: Raw connect string flags, e.g. '-db mydb -H localhost -S 3000'. Used when 'pf' is not set.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
